creator: bsdstats@nanoman.ca
text:
Alex Keda wrote:

[...]

>>Synopsis:       fail non-interactive installation sysutils/bsdstats

[...]

I saw the "I'll take it." response, and assumed that this had been
resolved long ago.  My apologies to everyone who had been kept waiting.

I've attached a patch that fixes this bug, cleans up pkg-install, and
updates PORTREVISION.

Alex, you can install BSDstats with everything set to "no" by declaring:

BSDSTATS_MONTHLY_ENABLE=no
BSDSTATS_REBOOT_REPORTING=no

Thank you to Alex Keda for submitting this bug report, and to 2A for the
reminder.  Sorry again to everyone for the extreme delay.
